meta_title: IV Drip Therapy — Coming Soon | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Intravenous vitamin and hydration therapy coming soon to My Private Clinic, Fulwood, Preston. Administered by Dr Faizal Secretary — a fully qualified GP.
hero_sub: IV vitamin and hydration therapy, coming soon to My Private Clinic — administered personally by Dr Faizal Secretary, a fully qualified GP, not a nurse or beauty therapist. Nutrients delivered directly into the bloodstream, backed by a proper pre-drip consultation, monitoring throughout, and clinical aftercare.
hero_trust: Launching Spring 2026 · GP-Administered · Register Interest Below
intro_quote: IV therapy done properly — by a GP, not a beauty therapist.
intro_heading: IV Drip Therapy in Preston — Coming Soon
intro_para_1: Seven intravenous vitamin and hydration formulas — administered personally by Dr Faizal Secretary. Every drip is preceded by a clinical assessment, monitored throughout, and followed up properly.
intro_para_2: This is not a beauty treatment. This is clinical IV therapy, delivered by a qualified GP who takes your safety seriously. Launching Spring 2026.

faqs.question: What IV drip formulas will be available?
faqs.answer: Seven formulas covering hydration, vitamin C, B-complex, NAD+, glutathione, Myers cocktail and immunity support. Details to be confirmed at launch.

faqs.question: Why have IV therapy at a GP clinic?
faqs.answer: IV therapy carries clinical risks. Having it administered by a GP — rather than a nurse or beauty therapist — means a proper pre-assessment, appropriate monitoring, and clinical oversight if anything unexpected occurs.

faqs.question: When is IV drip therapy launching?
faqs.answer: We are targeting Spring 2026. Register your interest to be notified when booking opens.

faqs.question: How do I register my interest?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034 or email hello@myprivate.clinic.
